Introducing
PHTN.ai IntelliOps
PHTN.ai IntelliOps
embeds intelligence at every support tier — progressively reducing manual effort while elevating team capability, regardless of platform.
Platform-agnostic:
Azure · Shopify Plus · Salesforce · SAP · Custom stacks — the same three levers apply to every environment.
One operating model
. Three AI levers. Every platform.
RESOLVE & LEARN
INTAKE
DIAGNOSE
Correlate alerts across all monitoring tools — Azure Monitor, Datadog, Splunk and more
Auto-classify incoming tickets by type, priority, and historical pattern
Surface anomalies before users report them
Reduce noise so engineers focus on what matters
RCA drafted in minutes from ticket history and runbook context
Contextual root cause suggestions ranked by likelihood
AI-generated stakeholder communication on active incidents
Pattern analysis across incidents to drive problem management
Known patterns resolved autonomously without human touch
AI-generated runbooks that stay current at every ticket close
Knowledge captured and searchable across the entire team
Continuous improvement fed back into detection and classification
